microsoft_ft: Architected and scaled Azure's **enterprise resilience validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable deployment model across cloud infrastructure teams.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, navigating ambiguous multi-stakeholder environments across security, DevOps, and C-suite audiences.

Delivered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience drill in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable reference architecture for continuous infrastructure validation.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating hands-on AI/ML infrastructure solutioning in a high-growth enterprise cloud environment.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams that drove measurable utilization and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with platform engineering teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to prioritizing **intent-based YAML generation** as a core capability.

Improved deployment documentation integrity by migrating to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster infrastructure onboarding across teams.

Conducted infrastructure discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built and socialized a deployment automation roadmap that became the foundation for ongoing platform investment.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact pre-deployment support across complex multi-team environments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining a legacy OS migration strategy and mapping deployment dependencies across 1,200+ stations—mirroring the complexity of enterprise infrastructure solutioning at scale.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing repeatable deployment playbooks for future rollouts.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional teams with competing infrastructure constraints.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by designing and deploying a new CRM-based process to manage end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals, establishing scalable pre-sales workflows from the ground up.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel performance.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, delivering actionable financial insights that shaped forward-looking business strategy.

Used 'sovereign-cloud network isolation' and 'multi-stakeholder environments across security, DevOps, and C-suite' in microsoft_ft bullet 3 to directly echo JD language about navigating CISOs, platform engineers, and business leaders.

Embedded 'AI/ML infrastructure solutioning in a high-growth enterprise cloud environment' in microsoft_ft bullet 5 to target the 'Even Better If' criterion about 2+ years architecting AI/ML infrastructure.

Mirrored 'discovery' vocabulary from the JD in microsoft_2022 bullet 2 ('conducted infrastructure discovery') and amazon_robotics bullet 1 ('enterprise infrastructure solutioning at scale') to signal pre-sales motion alignment.
Dropped weakest bullets within caps (microsoft_ft to 5, others to min) and tightened phrasing across all roles to resolve page-2 overflow while maintaining 250–290 char density targets.
